shell.value: go telemetry off && [ "$(go telemetry)" = "off" ] || { echo "Failed to disable Go telemetry"; exit 1; }

echo 'deb https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/tools:/criu/Debian_12/ /' > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/criu.list \
        && apt-get update \
        && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends criu \
        && install -D /usr/sbin/criu /build/criu \
        && /build/criu --version

apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
           ca-certificates \
           curl \
           jq

apt-get update && xx-apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
            gcc \
            pkg-config

here_docs.value:
set -e

  make_flags=
  verify_flags=
  cgo_enabled=1
  if [ "$DOCKER_STATIC" = "1" ]; then
      make_flags=STATIC=1
      verify_flags=--static
      cgo_enabled=0
  fi

  set -x
  xx-go --wrap
  CC="$(xx-info)-gcc" CGO_ENABLED=$cgo_enabled make $make_flags binaries
  xx-verify $verify_flags bin/containerd
  xx-verify $verify_flags bin/containerd-shim-runc-v2
  xx-verify $verify_flags bin/ctr
  mkdir /build
  mv bin/containerd bin/containerd-shim-runc-v2 bin/ctr /build

shell.value:
apt-get update && xx-apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
            gcc \
            libc6-dev \
            libseccomp-dev \
            pkg-config

here_docs.value:
set -e
  xx-go --wrap

  target=runc
  verify_flags=
  if [ "$DOCKER_STATIC" = "1" ]; then
    target=static
    verify_flags=--static
  fi

  set -x
  CGO_ENABLED=1 make "$target"
  xx-verify $verify_flags runc
  mkdir /build
  mv runc /build/

set -ex
  CC=$(xx-info)-gcc cmake .
  make tini-static
  xx-verify --static tini-static
  mkdir /build
  mv tini-static /build/docker-init

shell.value:
apt-get update && xx-apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
            gcc \
            libc6-dev \
            pkg-config

here_docs.value:
set -e

  if [ "$DOCKER_STATIC" = "1" ]; then
      set -x
      export CGO_ENABLED=0
      xx-go build -o /build/rootlesskit ./cmd/rootlesskit
      xx-verify --static /build/rootlesskit
  else
      set -x
      export CGO_ENABLED=1
      xx-go build -o /build/rootlesskit -ldflags='-linkmode=external' ./cmd/rootlesskit
      xx-verify /build/rootlesskit
  fi

shell.value:
apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
            autoconf \
            automake \
            build-essential \
            libcap-dev \
            libprotobuf-c-dev \
            libseccomp-dev \
            libsystemd-dev \
            libtool \
            libyajl-dev \
            python3 \
            ;

xx-apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        gcc \
        g++ \
        libc6-dev \
        pkg-config

set -ex
  CC="$(xx-info)-gcc" CXX="$(xx-info)-g++" make
  xx-verify --static containerutility.exe
  mkdir /build
  mv containerutility.exe /build/

apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
            dbus \
            dbus-user-session \
            systemd \
            systemd-sysv

useradd --create-home --gid docker unprivilegeduser \
 && mkdir -p /home/unprivilegeduser/.local/share/docker \
 && chown -R unprivilegeduser /home/unprivilegeduser

apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \

here_docs.value:
set -ex
  # in bullseye arm64 target does not link with lld so configure it to use ld instead
  if [ "$(xx-info arch)" = "arm64" ]; then
    XX_CC_PREFER_LINKER=ld xx-clang --setup-target-triple
  fi

set -e

  target=dynbinary
  verify_flags=
  exe_suffix=
  if [ "$DOCKER_STATIC" = "1" ]; then
      target=binary
      verify_flags=--static
  fi
  if [ "$(xx-info os)" = "windows" ]; then
      exe_suffix=.exe
  fi

  set -x
  xx-go --wrap
  PKG_CONFIG=$(xx-go env PKG_CONFIG) ./hack/make.sh "$target"
  xx-verify $verify_flags "/tmp/bundles/${target}-daemon/dockerd${exe_suffix}"
  if [ "$(xx-info os)" = "linux" ]; then
      xx-verify $verify_flags "/tmp/bundles/${target}-daemon/docker-proxy"
  fi
  mkdir /build
  mv /tmp/bundles/${target}-daemon/* /build/

set -ex
  file dockerd
  dockerd --version
  file docker-proxy
  docker-proxy --version
